reviews.review_description:
First, thank you developers for this VR coloring game.  I enjoyed it very much.
It is a relaxing and happy game to play.  The user interface and the presentation are pleased to my eye.
The only negative thing is more pictures to paint.  If possible, add  more 360 pictures into this game. More please.

Suggestion,  Can this game able to import user 2D pictures and 360 pictures to paint as well if possible.   
A new CREATIVE function , which allows user to create 360 picture from 3D objects to paint if possible. 

I do recommend this fun VR game for everyone to enjoy. 😇
